title: Phase 3 sidecar — components
description: Structured component catalog the Phase-3 (Architecture Modeling) LLM persists at PHASE_END. Consumed by scripts/build_threat_model_yaml.py to populate threat-model.yaml[components[]] without re-composing from working memory in Phase 11. See docs/substep2-deterministic-migration.md §2.1.

schema_version.description: Sidecar schema version. Bump only on breaking changes; add new fields via additions[] entries.

id.description: Canonical component ID used as component_id in threats[] and dispatch-context filenames. Lowercase + hyphens only.

description.description: 1-3 sentence summary of the component's role and technology stack.

paths.description: Glob patterns mapping the component to its source files. Source of truth for the Phase-9 dirty-set mapping — MUST reflect actual directory layout.

tier.description: Three-tier architecture classification used by the heatmap renderer. ≥1 component with tier=data is required when the app uses a database/cache/filestore.

complexity.description: Sizes the STRIDE-analyzer turn budget downstream (MAX_TURNS=22/22/31).

framework.description: Primary framework (express, angular, react, sequelize, fastapi, ...). Optional, surfaces in §2.4 layer tables.

additions.description: Optional cross-phase additions discovered after Phase 3 — usually empty. Reserved for future use; current pipeline does not populate.
